description_long: This is a dark green pith helmet, a classic style of sun hat with a wide, downward-sloping brim and a high, rounded crown. The crown features a small knob at the top and several metallic ventilation eyelets spaced around its circumference. There is a small black insignia or logo printed on one side of the crown, adding a subtle decorative touch. The brim is broad and slightly upturned at the edge, providing ample shade and protection from the sun. The surface appears to be made of a sturdy, matte-finished material, likely reinforced fabric or lightweight plastic, with a smooth, uniform texture. The overall design is utilitarian, evoking historical and expeditionary associations.
description: A dark green pith helmet with a wide brim, rounded crown, and metallic ventilation eyelets, featuring a small black logo on the side.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the logo and two metallic eyelets on the crown, with the knob at the top clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the logo and three metallic eyelets, with the brim's curvature prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the crown with two metallic eyelets and no visible logo.
description_view_3: Right-side view with two metallic eyelets visible and no logo, emphasizing the smooth, continuous surface of the crown and brim.
attribute_crown_shape: high and rounded with a central knob
